blockers.description: Question asks for a filter of cards in a release date in which the card game was not invented yet (Magic was released by Wizards of the Coast in 1993).
example_questions: What should be considered the filter for originalReleaseDate since there is no data regarding the year of 1991?
1991 is an invalid year for Wizards of the Coast's Magic card game release date, since it was launched in 1993. What value should be used instead?
What date should be used for filtering in originalReleaseDate if the requested year is inconsistent?
blockers.resolution: Consider cards with a null original release date

blockers.description: The question expects cards with life values being higher than 4 while also being lesser than zero.
example_questions: You asked for cards with negative life but also with a life greater than 4, what should I do?
You asked for cards with negative life but also with a life greater than 4, what should I consider for life values?
A card can not have life greater than 4 while also having negative life. What do you want me to filter for?
blockers.resolution: Only consider cards with null life.

blockers.description: The prompt asks for cards whose names reference a forest animal, but the exact values for which to filter for are not clear.
example_questions: Which exact names should I look for when looking for cards whose names reference a forest animal?
Which names reference a forest animal?
What are the names to look for when looking for cards whose names reference a forest animal?
blockers.resolution: To look for cards whose names reference a forest animal, look for names containing the exact words "wolf", "rat", "spider", "bear", or "beetle". Nothing more, and do not look for plural names.

blockers.description: The prompt mentions cards that are "very powerful", but it is not explained what values can be considered as "very".
example_questions: What would the power of very powerful cards be?
What power values should I use to look for very powerful cards?
What should I consider as very powerful cards? Cards with a power over 4?
blockers.resolution: The "very powerful" cards are those with a power greater than 5.
